CHAPTER 10. REMOTE ONLINE NOTARIZATION

§621. Short title

            This Chapter may be cited as the "Remote Online Notarization Act".

            Acts 2020, No. 254, §4, see Act.

CHAPTER 10.  REMOTE ONLINE NOTARIZATION
§621.  Short title
This Chapter may be cited as the "Remote Online Notarization Act".
Acts 2020, No. 254, §4, see Act.
